publishedAbstract: High latency in RocksDB transactions due to OMAPs not being compacted in the database. This results in the OSDs crashing. ~~~ 2024-12-04T19:15:26.466+0000 7f3d47b32640 1 heartbeat_map reset_timeout 'OSD::osd_op_tp thread 0x7f3d47b32640' had suicide timed out after 150.000000000s NAME READY STATUS RESTARTS AGE rook-ceph-osd-8-676774779d-rfsx5 2/2 Running 519 5d rook-ceph-osd-3-55c4d84b5d-d4bfc 2/2 Running 488 5d rook-ceph-osd-0-84694bd764-4fp52 2/2 Running 473 5d rook-ceph-osd-11-7f6d4b6645-q624g 2/2 Running 456 5d rook-ceph-osd-12-5d44f4678d-q4qq9 2/2 Running 537 5d rook-ceph-osd-13-859df6cdcc-w7v7h 2/2 Running 537 5d ~~~ ~~~ health: HEALTH_WARN 1 osds down Degraded data redundancy: 506465/10815969 objects degraded (4.683%), 148 pgs degraded, 108 pgs undersized 903 daemons have recently crashed services: mon: 3 daemons, quorum b,c,d (age 3h) mgr: a(active, since 2d) mds: 1/1 daemons up, 1 hot standby osd: 26 osds: 25 up (since 32s), 26 in (since 15h); 52 remapped pgs rgw: 1 daemon active (1 hosts, 1 zones) data: volumes: 1/1 healthy pools: 12 pools, 665 pgs objects: 3.61M objects, 9.0 TiB usage: 27 TiB used, 72 TiB / 99 TiB avail pgs: 506465/10815969 objects degraded (4.683%) 503 active+clean 73 active+undersized+degraded 50 active+recovery_wait+undersized+degraded+remapped 23 active+recovery_wait+degraded 12 active+undersized 2 active+recovery_wait 2 active+recovering+undersized+degraded+remapped io: client: 274 MiB/s rd, 1.4 GiB/s wr, 6.89k op/s rd, 799 op/s wr recovery: 114 MiB/s, 39 objects/s ~~~
publishedTitle: Ceph OSDs Crashing "osd_op_tp thread 0x7f3d47b32640' had suicide timed out after 150.000000000s"
